case_title: XIAOXI CHEN, ET AL VS. MIGUEL MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS XIAOXI CHEN AND MIGUEL MENDOZA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL MENDOZA IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,764.00 FILED BY CHEN, XIAOXI CHI, LUN AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, XIAOXI AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MIGUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $175.00 SERVED NOV-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MIGUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-02-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MIGUEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PURSUANT TO THE DEC-18-17 COURT ORDER IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
